caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, grey peaked wig, glasses, and large black over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of walls adorned with various framed photographs and clothing hanging on racks. To his left, a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK PODCAST" is visible, while the text "BOSS TALK" appears to his right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the waist up against the detailed studio backdrop.
